meaning: Federal Republic of Germany,(原)德意志联邦共和国
examples: Since the affiliation in 1990, the date and name used in the FRG have become the official ones for the former GDR as well.
The "new subjectivity" literature, which first appeared in FRG in the 1970s, is a literary phenomenon with its particular historical meanings.
This technique is developed on the basis of the Schaefer method (FRG) with the addition of a hydrogen extraction device to a conventional gas chromatography.
The modalities for the conference are still under discussion between the U.S. and the FRG.
The U.S. apparently has also agreed to a fifth working group governing East-West financial relations at the urging of the FRG.
